subcodes.first_line: Jinab-i-Haji: the letters which you had addressed to Jinab-i-Aqa Siyyid Taqi have been perused [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: جناب حاجی مکتوباتی که بجناب آقا سید تقی مرقوم نموده بودید ملاحظه گردید
subcodes.subjects: @consolation and comfort, @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause
